events.label: reasoning
events.text:
>
```json
{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.5,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Title block, revision, and matching callout are not visible in the provided sheet excerpt.",
    "Installed condition cannot be tied to the controlling drawing page.",
    "Calibration traceability and as-left/as-found data are not confirmed from the evidence provided."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Provide the complete calibration sheet with visible title block, revision, instrument tag, and callout.",
    "Verify calibration was performed against the correct loop/drawing and that as-found/as-left data is recorded.",
    "Confirm calibration certificate, standard used, and technician certification are on file per site QC and ISA standards."
  ],
  "rationale": "Without the title block, revision, and matching callout, the calibration cannot be verified against the controlling document. ISA standards and site QC require traceability to the correct instrument, drawing, and calibration procedure. The work may be compliant, but the evidence is insufficient to confirm it.",
  "references": [
    "ISA standards",
    "site QC"
  ]
}
```
